productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Stripes Blue Belts
description: An all-time favourite accessory, belts form an integral part of dressing. This signature leather belt from United Colours Of Benetton is set to pump up your style and add zing to your attire..LengthFreesizeMade of 95% polyester twill and 5% leather with blue,black and white contrast colours for enhanced styleLeather casing on either side of the belt with metallic loopsBroad base to sit snug on the waistBrand symbol appliqued near the metallic loopsCareWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustUse a leather conditioner to protect the leather if necessary
